name: Impossible Bacon Pie
recipeIngredient: 12 slices of bacon, cooked and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 10-inch pie plate.
3. Sprinkle the bacon, cheese, and onion evenly in the pie plate.
4. In a blender, beat the remaining ingredients for 15 seconds on high speed.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
6. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool for 5 minutes before serving.
VARIATION: Substitute 2 cups of fully cooked smoked ham for the bacon, cut into small pieces. For half the recipe, use 1 quart square or round casserole dish. Decrease onion to 2 tablespoons and divide the remaining ingredient amounts in half. Reduce blending time to 10 seconds. If baking at high altitude, bake for about 45 minutes.
